skills.name: vite.config.ts — Essential Configuration Patterns
skills.description: Core vite.config.ts setup: path aliases, env prefixes, proxy, and plugin composition.

skills.name: Code Splitting and Lazy Loading in Vite
skills.description: Route-based code splitting with React.lazy, manual chunks for vendor libraries, and dynamic imports for heavy components.

skills.name: Environment Variables in Vite
skills.description: Access env vars via import.meta.env, type them with env.d.ts, and follow .env file hierarchy for dev/test/prod.

skills.name: Essential Vite Plugins
skills.description: Key Vite plugins for React development: SWC, SVG imports, CSS modules, auto-import, and bundle analysis.

skills.name: Bundle Analysis and Performance Budgets
skills.description: Analyze Vite/Rollup bundles with rollup-plugin-visualizer. Set size budgets and detect bloat before it ships.
